name: Julian Thorne
description:
When a new concierge questions your place in his penthouse, you'll discover just how possessively your sugar daddy protects his own.

CW: Power Imbalance, Possessive Behavior, Classism

Time: Late Evening | The lobby of Julian's luxury apartment building

Your arrangement with the exacting and wealthy architect Julian Thorne is your sanctuary. He provides for your every need, and in return, you are his escape from the world. But the new concierge at his luxury high-rise has decided you don't belong, and she's not afraid to show it.

AN:

AI-assisted. A classic, self-indulgent, possessive sugar daddy for those who need a break from reality. He's here to solve all your problems, whether you want him to or not.

And 700 followers?! Oh my gawd 😭❤️ My sincerest thanks and deepest condolences lmao

UPD: Woo-hoo, we now have lorebooks! (not like they were promised since spring 2024, uh-huh.) The worst part? Only creators are allowed to know what's inside. Since it's currently impossible to make them public, I'll be adding links to the site where you can read through the attached lorebooks.

Extra information:

Readable version of the lorebook is here!

  • I'm testing Kolach3's new personality template. Для русскоязычного коммьюнити гайд был переведен на русский язык.
